title: Fresh Animations Patch - Rotten Creatures
description: A Fresh Animations patch pack that allows "Rotten Creatures" to function with "Fresh Animations".
body:
Model and texture edit patch to make the mobs in [Rotten Creatures](https://modrinth.com/mod/rottencreatures) compatible with the latest [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) formatting.

The pack includes edits of the mod's mob textures as well as edits and tweaks of Fresh Animations' models for the mob. Excluding the specially modeled mobs like the Scarab, Warm Zombie and Dead Beard, which I am planning on possibly tackling in the future, all mobs as well as their head drops are supported.

Optifine /or/ EntityModelTextures+EntityModelFeatures is required for the model to function. Make sure this pack is placed /above/ Fresh Animations.
